title: Dynamic dashboards in the mobile app (interactive charts)
excerpt: Being able to click in to charts and graphs in the mobile app the way you can on desktop would be very helpful (clicking the individual bars to expand the data contained in said group)

posts.author: cmf (Carly Flynn)
posts.cookedHtml: Being able to click in to charts and graphs in the mobile app the way you can on desktop would be very helpful (clicking the individual bars to expand the data contained in said group)
